name: yueling-bp-slidev
description: Yueling AI external business BP slide deck

scripts.export:fast: slidev export --output dist/slides-vector.pdf && pdftoppm -r 192 -png dist/slides-vector.pdf dist/page && magick dist/page-*.png -density 192 -units PixelsPerInch -compress zip slides-export.pdf && rm -f dist/page-*.png dist/slides-vector.pdf
